candidates.why: Primary operating revenue for an insurance group; largest and recurring top-line. Should be treated as main revenue line.
Additional revenue category that appears in older year; appropriate as secondary fallback per revenue rule.
Balancing item, not true revenue, but can serve as last-resort fallback per priority rule.

variables.notes: Multiple revenue labels provided as priority list; later code should take first non-missing per year.
No suitable cost of goods sold / direct cost line among candidates.

candidates.why: Main bucket of operating overhead expenses; appropriate as SG&A when explicit SG&A row exists but is numerically sparse in preview.
Mixed income/expense caption; less clearly pure SG&A, so secondary at best.
Classic SG&A component (personnel/overhead).
Classic SG&A component (other overhead).
Explicit SG&A line; although preview values are empty, rules say to prefer this plus an overhead bucket like Operating expenses.

variables.notes: Following rule (b): explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty, so include that plus broad Operating expenses bucket. Not including Other Operating Income/Expense to avoid mixing non-operating income with SG&A.
No research & development row among candidates; treated as zero.

candidates.why: Interest cost related to banking operations; clearly an interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses securities issued and other interest expenses
candidates.why: Core financing interest expense line; strong candidate for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses securities issued and other interest expenses - remaining
candidates.why: Residual portion of the same interest expense; good secondary fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; belongs in interest expense bucket though smaller.
Generic interest expenses line; strong candidate especially for years where others may be missing.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit for the period - non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Represents profit attribution, not interest; should NOT be used for XINT.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease interest disclosure; valid but secondary.
Equity component, not a P&L interest expense.
Equity component, not a P&L interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses securities issued and other interest expenses
Interest expenses securities issued and other interest expenses - remaining
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided multiple plausible interest-expense rows as ordered priority list; equity/MIN-related candidates correctly excluded from final_choice.

candidates.why: Appears to be an income-statement concept, not a balance-sheet equity total.
Component of equity, not total book equity.
Total equity attributable to owners (likely excluding non-controlling interests); standard choice for book equity when MIB is modeled separately.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; alternative measure but less aligned when MIB is modeled separately.
Balancing adjustment, not a true equity total.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line for the whole balance sheet, not pure equity.
Represents total assets; not equity alone.

variables.notes: Chose parent-company equity (Total Equity) since minority interests are modeled separately as MIB.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit for the period - non-controlling interests
candidates.why: P&L attribution to NCI; useful for flows but MIB target is a balance-sheet item, so secondary.
Appears to be income-statement attribution; again a flow, not stock.

candidates.row_label: Minority portion of consolidated mutual funds
candidates.why: Represents minority portion but specific to mutual funds; could be part of NCI; secondary.
Canonical balance-sheet line for minority interest / NCI; primary choice for MIB.
Alternative label for non-controlling interest; good fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Minority portion of consolidated mutual funds

variables.notes: Provided balance-sheet NCI labels as priority list; income-statement minority-interest flows excluded from final_choice because MIB desires stock (balance) not flow.
